Bug / Task Description: The concurrent token bucket test in pkg/ratelimit should verify rate-limiter invariants without flaking on wall-clock refill races. Relax the exact allowed-count assertion into a tight, justified tolerance band: the test must still fail if the limiter grants zero throughput, grants far beyond burst plus plausible refill, or ignores the burst cap, but it must pass reliably under repeated parallel runs and the race detector. Do not change bucket runtime behavior or public API.
